query:
INSERT INTO agents (userId, agentName, description, endpointUrl, capabilities, connectionTested, successCount, totalCount, avgLatencyMs, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT
  u.id,
  v.agentName,
  v.description,
  v.endpointUrl,
  v.capabilities,
  1,
  v.successCount,
  v.totalCount,
  v.avgLatencyMs,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Gulf Sentiment Labeler' AS agentName, 'Classifies sentiment in Arabic text with dialect detection across all 6 Gulf states. Returns label, confidence, dialect, and rationale.' AS description, 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/sentiment' AS endpointUrl, '["arabic nlp","sentiment analysis","gulf dialect","data labeling","annotation"]' AS capabilities, 12 AS successCount, 14 AS totalCount, 2100 AS avgLatencyMs
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic NER Agent', 'Extracts and classifies named entities (persons, organisations, locations, dates, monetary values) from Arabic text. Supports MSA and Gulf dialect.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/ner', '["arabic nlp","named entity recognition","ner","data labeling","annotation","entities"]', 10, 11, 2400
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Islamic Finance Intent Classifier', 'Classifies user intent across Islamic finance products: murabaha, sukuk, takaful, zakat, waqf, ijara. Essential for Shariah-compliant AI chatbots.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/intent', '["arabic nlp","islamic finance","intent classification","data labeling","annotation","gulf banking"]', 8, 9, 1900
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Legal Clause Extractor', 'Identifies, classifies, and flags clauses in Arabic contracts and regulatory documents. Supports GCC jurisdiction tagging and risk level assessment.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/legal', '["arabic nlp","legal clause extraction","contract analysis","data labeling","annotation","gcc legal"]', 7, 8, 2600
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Code-Switch Detector', 'Detects and annotates Arabic-English code-switching patterns common in Gulf professional communication. Classifies switch points and mixing ratio.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/codeswitch', '["arabic nlp","code switching","arabizi","data labeling","annotation","bilingual nlp"]', 9, 10, 1700
) v
LIMIT 1;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2dg2iR9orw75o4J.0aefcec34322 --database 7EnctkaNppkKLbjFfnH6YY --execute 
INSERT INTO agents (userId, agentName, description, endpointUrl, capabilities, connectionTested, successCount, totalCount, avgLatencyMs, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT
  u.id,
  v.agentName,
  v.description,
  v.endpointUrl,
  v.capabilities,
  1,
  v.successCount,
  v.totalCount,
  v.avgLatencyMs,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM users u
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Gulf Sentiment Labeler' AS agentName, 'Classifies sentiment in Arabic text with dialect detection across all 6 Gulf states. Returns label, confidence, dialect, and rationale.' AS description, 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/sentiment' AS endpointUrl, '["arabic nlp","sentiment analysis","gulf dialect","data labeling","annotation"]' AS capabilities, 12 AS successCount, 14 AS totalCount, 2100 AS avgLatencyMs
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic NER Agent', 'Extracts and classifies named entities (persons, organisations, locations, dates, monetary values) from Arabic text. Supports MSA and Gulf dialect.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/ner', '["arabic nlp","named entity recognition","ner","data labeling","annotation","entities"]', 10, 11, 2400
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Islamic Finance Intent Classifier', 'Classifies user intent across Islamic finance products: murabaha, sukuk, takaful, zakat, waqf, ijara. Essential for Shariah-compliant AI chatbots.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/intent', '["arabic nlp","islamic finance","intent classification","data labeling","annotation","gulf banking"]', 8, 9, 1900
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Legal Clause Extractor', 'Identifies, classifies, and flags clauses in Arabic contracts and regulatory documents. Supports GCC jurisdiction tagging and risk level assessment.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/legal', '["arabic nlp","legal clause extraction","contract analysis","data labeling","annotation","gcc legal"]', 7, 8, 2600
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Arabic Code-Switch Detector', 'Detects and annotates Arabic-English code-switching patterns common in Gulf professional communication. Classifies switch points and mixing ratio.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/codeswitch', '["arabic nlp","code switching","arabizi","data labeling","annotation","bilingual nlp"]', 9, 10, 1700
) v
LIMIT 1;
